title: senecio erisithalifolius
intro: Senecio erisithalifolius is a plant species commonly known as 'Rough-leaved Flax-leaved Groundsel', a member of the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues and reduce swelling. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and promoting digestion. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Senecio erisithalifolius have been made into infusions, tinctures, and salves to utilize its medicinal properties.
